heading: Savings clause
label: 8342 Savings clause
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this title, nothing in this subtitle shall be construed as divesting any appropriate Federal banking agency of any authority it may have to establish or enforce, with respect to a person for which such agency is the appropriate Federal banking agency, prudential or other standards pursuant to authority by Federal law other than this title.11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title VII of , , , known as the Wall Street Transparency and Accountability Act of 2010, which enacted this chapter and enacted and amended numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of title VII to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–203124 Stat. 1754section 77b of this titlesection 78c of this titleJuly 21, 2010oo
